opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My head is throbbing relentlessly, my vision keeps blurring, and I am too exhausted to even stand up.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The headache has been building for a couple of days and tonight it got much worse, and now my sight keeps going blurry and I have no energy at all.

symptom_narrative.onset: the tiredness and headache crept in over about the last 48 hours; tonight the headache suddenly got much worse
symptom_narrative.duration: roughly two days, worse in the last few hours
symptom_narrative.character: a constant, deep, throbbing pain at the back of the head
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst it has been; I can't do anything, I just have to lie in the dark
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant now, not coming and going
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: lying still in a dark quiet room helps a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: light hurts my eyes and moving around makes it worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: my vision keeps going blurry in short spells, and I'm so exhausted I can't get out of bed; I've also been getting up a lot in the night to pass water for a while now
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've never had a headache like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm stuck resting in bed and can't manage my normal daily tasks

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: high blood pressure for many years
past_medical_history.how_managed: I'm supposed to be on blood pressure tablets but I only take them now and then, when I feel tense

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: I've been told my kidneys aren't working as well as they should
past_medical_history.how_managed: just meant to keep my blood pressure down, but I haven't been good with that

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; admits he often forgets or skips his blood pressure tablets and only takes them when he feels tense

objective_data_offered.value: squinting and shielding his eyes from the light, holding the back of his head, looks drained and uncomfortable
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: impression over a video call only; no measurement taken

access_barriers.transport: lives alone with no one present tonight to drive him
